description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. Those who love elegant classics can wear this piece with tonal outfits and add one vibrant, matching piece in the ensemble. Made of textured two-tone leatherette with a metallic brand badge on the front and contrast stitch detailing Two leatherette shoulder handles One main roomy compartment with a zippered separator and a zippered pocket and a mobile pouch inside One zippered pocket at the back Metal ring detailing all over Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
